metadata.challenge_summary: Each hero gets ambiguous evidence; they must compare observations before committing attacks or routes.
dilemmas: Splitting improves observations but risks isolation
warden_runbook: Exploit inconsistent beliefs through decoy movement
Make false positives costly but not lethal
metadata.lite_focus: Four-room mirror hold with one mirror adept and one ordinary guard; the lesson is to verify before committing.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: verify decoys before committing scarce major actions
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure the declared MARL axis: belief-state fusion under decoys
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: coordinate extraction once the objective is secured
coordination_skills: compare observations before attacking or opening
assign one scout to verify mirror rooms
hold resources until target identity is confirmed
metadata.tier_test_focus: Small two-hero diagnostic for communication and first-order decoy discrimination and role confirmation coordination.
coordination_demands: compare observations before attacking or opening
assign one scout to verify mirror rooms
hold resources until target identity is confirmed

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Frost Mirror Hold is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

upper_right.name: Upper Right
upper_right.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: belief-state fusion under decoys.

lower_left.name: Lower Left
lower_left.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

lower_right.name: Lower Right
lower_right.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Frost Mirror
furniture.description: Primary clue object for belief-state fusion under decoys. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

furniture.name: Support Marker
furniture.description: A small support object that makes the non-damaging coordination action visible in transcript review.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains belief-state fusion under decoys.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: Four-room mirror hold with one mirror adept and one ordinary guard; the lesson is to verify before committing.

core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Exploit inconsistent beliefs through decoy movement
pressure the declared MARL axis: belief-state fusion under decoys
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.
